change_comments.message:
Really good you have solved how to create a TestContainer for the Stub! 
Overall a good commit but a little bit of clean up left though
looks good, just a few small suggestions to make it better

agreed with Daniels comment below
and left a few Groovy convention related comments (none of them blocking really but goor to do if you are doing another patch. I should have spotted some of them earlier...)
All comments look to be resolved. Just merge conflict to sort.

inline_comments.message: it's Groovy! Just def will do!
can we check a bit more of the content ?

instead of RANDOM UUI I woudl use a counter that increase everytimg the stub is called on this method, it will be easier for demo's etc. 

e.g. ahve a class field
intr subJobWitreRequestCounter = 0

and in thsi method use: new SubJobWriteResponse(++subJobWitreRequestCounter .toString()...

could you call it twice and proof tha second call gets id = 2 (as per stub behavior)

Make sure you stil do a SELF REVIEW.
Thes kind of copy and paste errors are preventable if you do a critical self-review in Nordix befoer asking others to review :-)
